final_prompt.prompt:
Create an Instagram-style photo of a stylish Korean café coffee and dessert setup with hand-drawn annotations (all in-image text in Japanese).

Style/medium: needs a Korean café aesthetic with smartphone photo quality — exact stylistic execution is yours; needs hand-drawn annotation overlay with thin white sketch lines, rough one-stroke style, slightly uneven contour lines tracing objects, arrows and dashed lines for visual guidance
Composition: must include the coffee and dessert as focal subjects, no people present; must include hand-drawn annotations with arrows and contour lines around elements
Subject: must include coffee beverage and dessert pastry (no people)
Scene/backdrop: must include Korean café interior setting
Lighting/mood: needs a bright, airy Instagram-worthy atmosphere — exact light source mix is yours
Color palette: needs a warm, soft café aesthetic — exact hex values are yours
Materials/textures: needs smartphone photo texture with hand-drawn sketch overlay — exact grain and line quality is yours
Text (verbatim): must include Japanese handwritten text annotations (70% hiragana, 30% simple kanji) with diary-style short comments: 饮料 comments on taste/temperature/mood (e.g., さっぱり、やさしい甘み), 食物 comments on texture/deliciousness (e.g., しっとり、さいこう), 空间 comments on atmosphere (e.g., リラックス、いい時間), 整体 one-line summary (e.g., しあわせすぎる～); must include decorative elements: steam, sparkles, hearts, small emoji-style accents
Constraints: must include all in-image text in Japanese by default; must preserve the Instagram story / magazine rough-note aesthetic; must leave appropriate white space; annotations must not overwhelm the image
Avoid: must avoid excessive decoration, must avoid cluttering the composition, must avoid English text
